task_completion.description: STOCK, CUT, and ETCH layers are created with correct colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layer list panel in LibreCAD shows 'STOCK' (black/white color indicator), 'CUT' (red color indicator), and 'ETCH' (blue color indicator).

task_completion.description: A square boundary representing the stock is drawn.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A large square is visible in the drawing workspace, corresponding to the STOCK layer.

task_completion.description: Gasket geometry is drawn with outer and inner circles, and four bolt holes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The drawing contains gasket shapes consisting of a large outer circle, a smaller concentric inner circle, and four small circles (bolt holes) arranged in a ring between them. These should be on the CUT layer (red).

task_completion.description: The text 'G-01' is added to the gaskets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'G-01' is visible on the drawing for each gasket, corresponding to the ETCH layer (blue).

task_completion.description: Four gaskets are nested within the stock boundary without overlapping.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Exactly four complete gasket shapes are arranged entirely inside the square boundary, and none of the gaskets overlap each other or the boundary.

task_completion.description: The drawing is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD window title bar shows 'gasket_nesting.dxf' or a save dialog shows the file being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/gasket_nesting.dxf'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the LibreCAD GUI to create the drawing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using LibreCAD tools (e.g., drawing tools, layer management) rather than just opening a pre-made file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script or terminal command to generate the DXF file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing Python scripts or other commands being executed to create the DXF file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/gasket_nesting.dxf. Layer specs: STOCK (White/Black, contains 200x200mm square), CUT (Red, contains gasket geometry), ETCH (Blue, contains text 'G-01'). Gasket specs: 80mm OD, 50mm ID, four 6mm bolt holes on 65mm bolt circle. Quantity: 4 gaskets, nested within the 200x200mm stock boundary without overlapping.
